title: <div>M4.3 – DSL / Language Workbench3. Holden – Build Your Own Programming Langu
content:
M4.3 – DSL / Language Workbench3. Holden – Build Your Own Programming LanguagePrototype a tiny DSL for ritual chants.
• ANTLR / Tree‑sitter
M4.4 – Data‑Intensive Fusion4. Kleppmann – Designing Data‑Intensive ApplicationsCreate DATA_FUSION_LAYER/—append‑only event log for rituals.
• PostgreSQL / Kafka
M4.5 – Functional Metaphysics5. Functional Programming in Scala (Red Book)
Translate a recursion ritual into pure FP; add tests.
• Scala CLI
🌕 CAPSTONE – LIVE OS BLOOM
• Deliverable: Bootable, containerized, AI‑talking, myth‑infused OS prototype.
• Demo Ritual: Speak invocation chant → system spawns agent → agent compiles/executes unit test.
• Peer Review: Share Git repo + README with your CS friend for critique.
📚 CONTINUOUS EDUCATION LOOPS
Whenever you spin a new thread/project, cross‑reference these keeper disciplines:
Field
Why It Expands You
Quick‑Start Source
Functional ProgrammingEnhances immutability & recursion thinking
